name: Self-Filled Cup Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mix according to the package instructions.
2. In a separate bowl, beat together the cream cheese and sugar until smooth.
3. Add the egg and salt to the cream cheese mixture and continue beating until well combined.
4. Pour about 3/4 of the prepared cake batter into each paper cup.
5. Stir in the chocolate chips with the cream cheese mixture.
6. Spoon approximately 1 teaspoon of the cream cheese mixture into each cupcake.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for 20 minutes.
